deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'if [ -z "$DATABASE_URL" ]; then echo "ERROR: DATABASE_URL is not set. Please link a PostgreSQL database in Railway."; exit 1; fi && npx prisma db push --schema=packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && npx tsx packages/database/seed.ts && cd apps/bot && exec node dist/index.js'
